headline: Coinbase Boosts MassPay Stablecoin Payouts by 50%

article.title: MassPay taps Coinbase to expand stablecoin payouts
article.summary: MassPay taps Coinbase to add USDC-powered cross-border payouts, betting stablecoin rails will cut costs and speed up settlement for businesses paying globally.

article.title: Franklin Templeton, BNP Paribas see tokenization boosting EU's capital efficiency
article.summary: Executives from Franklin Templeton and BNP Paribas say tokenized assets and stablecoins could improve capital efficiency across Europe as Wall Street expands tokenization efforts.

headline: Stocks Surge 2% on US-Iran Deal Optimism

article.title: Stocks Jump as Trump Signals US-Iran Deal Is Close: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Wall Street traders drove stocks higher and oil fell as President Donald Trump canceled scheduled strikes against Iran and signaled a deal is near, fueling hopes for an end to the war that has roiled markets.

headline: US Stocks Surge 2% on Iran Strike Reprieve

article.title: US Stocks Soar as Trump Says He’s Called Off New Iran Strikes
article.summary: US stocks rose to session highs following two straight losing days, as President Donald Trump said he’s called off planned military strikes on Iran, hours after threatening to escalate the three-month war.

headline: Institutions Tap $1Bn Bitcoin Yield on Lightning Network

article.title: BitGo Launches Lightning Earn to Let Institutions Put Bitcoin to Work on Lightning Network
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

BitGo Launches Lightning Earn to Let Institutions Put Bitcoin to Work on Lightning Network
BitGo launched Lightning Earn, enabling institutional bitcoin holders to earn BTC-denominated fees by providing Lightning Network liquidity through an integration with Amboss Rails.

headline: $10B Predictions Market Surge Expected by Bernstein

article.title: World Cup Could Bring Billions in Volume to Prediction Markets in 'Watershed Moment': Bernstein
article.summary: The 48-team FIFA World Cup tournament is expected to be the single largest catalyst for online sports betting in history, Bernstein said.

headline: Bitcoin Plunges 10% as Debasement Trade Unwinds Fast

article.summary: The retreat from the debasement trade has continued for gold and accelerated for bitcoin in recent weeks, JPMorgan analysts said.

headline: Coinbase Launches 1000 AI Trading Accounts Overnight

article.summary: AI agents will get access to trade, manage money, and make payments on behalf of Coinbase users via dedicated accounts.
